keyPoints: Randomize AI role across domains (none, assistive, co-creative) and novelty levels.
Center measurements on domain-appropriate originality metrics plus diversity and process-trace indicators.
Emphasize prompts and collaboration rituals that promote divergent thinking and counter AI convergence.
Map domain-specific guidelines for writing, coding, and design to sustain originality while managing homogenization.
Pre-register hypotheses and document prompts, model versions, and collaboration patterns for transparency.
Use multimodal prompts and human-in-the-loop critique to preserve voice, ownership, and responsible AI use.
